summary: Plan-mode live PR inventory classification for five open pull requests. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard; no close, merge, label, comment, fix, or security-route mutation is planned.

actions.reason: The PR appears useful and potentially ready, but the live label says waiting on author and the job requires human handling for active author follow-up or maintainer signal. No close action is safe and merge/fix actions are blocked by job frontmatter.

This is an independent feature/provider compatibility PR, not a duplicate or low-signal closeout. The failing Real behavior proof blocks any merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout, and merge/fix actions are not allowed in this job.
This is an independent docs/platforms PR. Although it has low-signal/external-plugin-candidate triage labels, low-signal PR closeout is explicitly disabled, so no close action is planned.
This is an independent medium-sized bug fix PR with passing checks in the artifact. It is not a duplicate or low-signal closeout, and the job blocks merge and fix actions.

The PR has an explicit maintainer CHANGES_REQUESTED review with concrete technical blockers. The job requires human handling for maintainer signal/technical correctness judgment, and no close/merge/fix action is allowed.

needs_human: #87481: live label indicates waiting on author for a message-delivery-risk agent PR; comments were not hydrated, so maintainer/author follow-up should remain outside automated closeout.
#90468: MEMBER review requested changes for parser regressions, requiring author update or maintainer technical judgment before any further action.
